subcodes.first_line: O thou bright pearl! Endeavor, and spare no effort, and hasten to the Kingdom of thy Lord, the Lord of the shining and clear evidences and arguments.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الخریده الغراء شمری عن ساق الاجتهاد و اسرعی الی مطلع الایات ملکوت ربک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @methods of teaching the Cause
